claims.statement: importFile calls requireAuthenticated before importing a file.
importFile throws an IllegalArgumentException when Files.isRegularFile(sourceFile) is false.
importFile reads plaintext bytes using Files.readAllBytes(sourceFile).
importFile creates storedName by appending .cvault to UUID.randomUUID().
importFile gets mimeType by calling detectMimeType(sourceFile).
importFile encrypts plaintext with sessionKey and associated data by calling cryptoService.encrypt.
importFile resolves the encrypted file path using appPaths.vaultDirectory().resolve(storedName).
importFile writes payload.ciphertext() to the encrypted file using Files.write with CREATE_NEW and WRITE options.
importFile inserts a VaultFileRecord into vaultFileRepository.
importFile logs FILE_IMPORTED with the original file name and formatted size.
importFile deletes the encrypted file with Files.deleteIfExists(encryptedFile) when a SQLException occurs after writing the file.

entities.name: importFile
entities.description: Method that encrypts and imports a file into the vault.

entities.name: buildAssociatedData
entities.description: Method that builds associated data from file name and size.

entities.name: ciphertext
entities.description: Method call used to access encrypted ciphertext bytes.

entities.name: deleteIfExists
entities.description: Method call used to delete a file if it exists.

entities.name: detectMimeType
entities.description: Method that detects a file MIME type.

entities.name: encrypt
entities.description: Method call used to encrypt plaintext.

entities.name: getFileName
entities.description: Method call used to get a path's file name.

entities.name: insert
entities.description: Method call used to insert a vault file record.

entities.name: isRegularFile
entities.description: Method call used to test whether a path is a regular file.

entities.name: log
entities.description: Method call used to write an audit log entry.

entities.name: now
entities.description: Method call used to obtain the current instant.

entities.name: randomUUID
entities.description: Method call used to generate a random UUID.

entities.name: readAllBytes
entities.description: Method call used to read all bytes from a file.

entities.name: requireAuthenticated
entities.description: Method that enforces that a session key is present.

entities.name: resolve
entities.description: Method call used to resolve a child path.

entities.name: toString
entities.description: Method call used to convert a value to a string.

entities.name: vaultDirectory
entities.description: Method call used to obtain the vault directory path.

entities.name: withId
entities.description: Method call used to return a record with an assigned id.

entities.name: write
entities.description: Method call used to write bytes to a file.

entities.name: User
entities.description: The human user.

relations.description: importFile calls isRegularFile to validate the source file.
importFile calls readAllBytes to load plaintext.
importFile calls getFileName to obtain the original file name.
importFile calls toString on the file name.
importFile calls randomUUID to generate a stored file name.
importFile calls detectMimeType to determine MIME type.
importFile calls now to timestamp the import.
importFile calls encrypt to encrypt file contents.
importFile calls buildAssociatedData for AEAD associated data.
importFile calls vaultDirectory to locate storage.
importFile calls resolve to build the encrypted file path.
importFile calls write to persist ciphertext.
importFile calls ciphertext to access encrypted bytes.
importFile calls insert to store metadata.
importFile calls log to record the import.
importFile calls withId to return the persisted record.
importFile calls deleteIfExists during rollback on SQL failure.
